subject: Mathematics
topic: Use one packet and optional daily print splits

task_sheet.title: Comparison Packet
task_sheet.purpose_line: Keep the full packet intact, but allow day-by-day print copies when needed.
instructions: Use the packet as your full working record.
If your teacher prints day-by-day, the tasks should still read as one build.

tasks.label: Day 1 / Part A
tasks.prompt: Fill in the short values from the comparison notes.

render_hints.heading: Day 1 values
blank_prompts: The small package is ___ cm wide.

tasks.label: Day 2 / Part A
tasks.prompt: Choose the strongest option for today's comparison.

embedded_supports: Use selector marks for choices, not full explanations.
success_criteria: I can work from the full packet or from one printed day at a time.
